title: Library of Congress: Dust Bowl Migration
description: A source card for the Library of Congress Dust Bowl Migration primary-source set.

pages.text: The Library of Congress Dust Bowl Migration primary-source set gathers photographs, maps, songs, poems, and classroom guides about migration during the Great Depression.
Students can use the set to study how drought, soil practices, economic hardship, farm foreclosure, transportation, and public policy shaped families' decisions to move west.
Rights note: Library of Congress classroom sets are excellent discovery tools, but each item can have its own rights status. Check the item page before mirroring an image or document.
